datasetLabel: 1001 Genomes Plus Phase 1 FT promoter sequence scan

motifs.label: NFYC2
motifs.description: JASPAR UN0690.2 Arabidopsis NFYC2 (CCAAT-box / CO-NF-Y element). The CCAAT boxes bound by NF-YB/NF-YC are the primary CO-responsive elements in the FT promoter.

motifs.label: AGL15
motifs.description: JASPAR MA0548.3 Arabidopsis AGL15 PWM as a MADS-box proxy for FT promoter repression-like sites.

motifs.label: PIF4
motifs.description: JASPAR MA0561.1 Arabidopsis PIF4 (G-box / E-box CACGTG). bHLH; CO is recruited to the FT promoter G-box via FBH1-4 bHLH proteins with this motif.

motifs.label: TCP20
motifs.description: JASPAR MA1065.3 Arabidopsis TCP20 PWM for class-I TCP promoter signals.

motifs.label: CDF2
motifs.description: JASPAR MA0973.2 Arabidopsis CDF2 PWM, relevant to photoperiodic FT regulation.

motifs.label: CCA1
motifs.description: JASPAR MA0972.1 Arabidopsis CCA1 PWM for circadian-associated promoter signals.

motifs.label: FLC
motifs.description: JASPAR MA0558.2 Arabidopsis FLC (FLOWERING LOCUS C) PWM — the primary vernalization-sensitive FT repressor.

motifs.label: SVP
motifs.description: JASPAR MA0555.2 Arabidopsis SVP (SHORT VEGETATIVE PHASE) PWM — MADS-box repressor acting with FLC to repress FT.

motifs.label: MYC3
motifs.description: JASPAR MA0568.2 Arabidopsis MYC3 bHLH — G-box (CACGTG) binding; integrates JA signalling with flowering.

motifs.label: SMZ
motifs.description: JASPAR UN0875.1 Arabidopsis SMZ (SCHLAFMÜTZE) AP2/ERF — binds GCC-box; represses FT in non-inductive conditions.

motifs.label: TEM1
motifs.description: JASPAR MA1800.1 Arabidopsis TEM1 (TEMPRANILLO 1) RAV/B3 — binds RAV1-A element; delays flowering by repressing FT.

notes: Contains a strong PIF4-like PWM hit in the scanned promoter window.
